title: EasyLoginMod
description: a minecraft forge mod that provides login service for servers
body:
a minecraft mod that provides login services and commands
### common commands
/register -> register an account

/login -> login

/changepassword [password] [confirm]-> change your password(require login first)

### AdminCommands
/easylogin playerinfo [player] -> check 

/easylogin changepassword [player] [password] [confirm] -> change the password of target player
